entry.title: Re: How to delete a reosurce in ppds
entry.content:
Go to RES01 , untick model independent selection check box and execute

now select model assignments and unassign from active model version 

once it is done , you will be able to delete the resource.

Regards,

Sowrya.

entry.title: Re: The Substitute of MM50 in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hi @ravi_kumar100 ,

Business users can extend sales view one material by one material from Manage Product Master App by click 'create' in the Distribution Chains

entry.title: Re: Restrict Data Point Comments visibility to individual...
entry.content: Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Recommended RAR Structures in interface component con...
entry.content:
Hi Marvin, Thank you for your question. This is a comprehensive topic that would benefit from a more in-depth analysis, potentially in a consulting context which we cannot do through the SAP community platform.

If I understand your use case correctly, the customer is generating order RAIs from FICA. The POBs are time-based, with no fulfillment RAIs, and invoice RAIs are sourced either from SD or an external billing system.

As usual, the fulfillment type of POBs is determined via BRF+. The start and end dates are derived from the provider contract in the order RAI. The key challenges appear to be:

  • Correctly setting the ORIGDOC in the invoice RAIs.
  • Populating customer-specific attributes in the order RAIs.

Is that an accurate understanding?

For further guidance, I recommend starting with SAP Note 2392956. Additionally, the RIN Note 3357659 - Revenue Accounting and Reporting with SAP S/4HANA 2023: Release Information Note and SAP Note 2582784 may also be helpful.

Unfortunately, I’m not aware of any specific documentation detailing the mapping logic and structures.

For more information on the integration of FICA with RAR, please refer to the official documentation:

  • FICA Integration with RAR: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/fc005cff24e9430691c1e05ffd5f0eee/bd938719107c47268d8861f433bda76d.html?version=2020.latest
  • Field Extensibility and BAdIs in RAR: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/f63dd39a28bb4b90adbf9e608aff58ea/3dad6054a7ad2257e10000000a44176d.html?q=Revenue+Accounting+and+Reporting

Best regards, 

Volkmar Zahn

S/4HANA Product Management

entry.title: Re: Joule for ABAP-Developers: An unexpected error occured
entry.content: Yes, Problem was solved by SAP-Support!

entry.title: Re: How to maintain customer groups 1,2,3,4,5 ?
entry.content:
Customer Group, which comes under Order data tab of Sales and distribution in BP: that can be configured to T-Code: OVS9. The value you create, assign it to Customer. and in the Sales Order you can find the Customer Group in Sales Order Header view under Sales data tab.

Customer Group 1, 2,3, 4, 5: comes under Additional data tab of Sales and distribution in BP. It can be configured through V_TVV1 (Cust Grp 1), V_TVV2 (Cust Grp 2), V_TVV3 (Cust Grp 3), V_TVV4 (Cust Grp 4), V_TVV5 (Cust Grp 5). once the data is maintained in BP, the same will be flowed in sales Order under Additional data tab.

Configuration, BP Location & SO data Location is clarified. Hope you understand well.

entry.title: Re: Storage bin determination for synchronous goods receipts
entry.content:
@Ajit

I should have been clearer, but in the public cloud those options don't appear to be available. You can activate the synchronous goods receipt, but you can't edit the default storage bin.

Within the process type configuration, you can't edit the source/destination bins either.

There is a separate configuration node to assign bins based on process type but even though I have configured my own process type for the synchronous goods receipt and left the source/destination blank, the "GR-AREA" bin is still being determined automatically.

entry.title: Scrollbars in Grouptree are not working in SP38
entry.content:
Hi,
Recently we have installed SAP Crystal Reports version for Visual Studio (SP 38), and did observed following issue with the scrollbars of GroupTree. 

1. The Last record of Group tree is not visible.

2. Horizontal scrollbar is also not visible.

I have attached screenshot of defected Grouptree and expected one. Also same was working fine with SP35, this issue is introduced with SP38.

entry.title: Re: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders （6VW)
entry.content:
Go to  Api.sap.com >click on 'Explore' button and choose 'SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition'

Click on search icon and enter 'Mass Creation of Purchase Orders' you will see its DEPRECATED

SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Note:Search always in  Api.sap.com only for Api,O data,CDS,SAOP,BAdi, Integrations etc related to  any SAP product.

Kindly follow below KBA for mass uploading of PO/PR

3350690 - Create Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order via template - SAP for Me

entry.title: Full SQL documentation for Process Intelligence Backend?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

when creating Data Views and Business Objects for SAP Signavio Process Intelligence Process Data Pipeline I am struggling to find a suitable list of SQL-functions that are available.

Following the Process Intelligence Guide (Data Type Requirements for Process Data Pipelines | SAP Help Portal) transformation scripts use AWS Athena, which is based on Trino. For a list of available SQL-functions the guide refers to Trino documentation — Trino 476 Documentation . While this definitely helps, it seems to me that this is not the full answer.

Example:
I cannot get the function LISTAGG to work, which is discussed in the Trino documentation. I am trying to use the following code:

SELECT
  CONCAT(mandt, bukrs, belnr, gjahr) AS bkpf_c_key
  ,COUNT(buzei) AS buzei_count
  ,LISTAGG(bschl, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY buzei) bschl_array
FROM bseg
GROUP BY CONCAT(mandt, bukrs, belnr, gjahr)

The following error message comes up:

Error: VALIDATION_ERROR
Error Id: d13e7b49-d445-4212-87ca-1efe2f720863Landscape: prod_cloud_os_euValidation
Error occurred: Syntax issue: mismatched input '(' expecting 'BY'

So it seems to me, the function is known, but the suggested code from the Trino guide is not working in the Signavio environment. Apparently there is some validation checking that GROUP has to be followed by BY.  And further after GROUP BY <attribute> the end of the file is expected. This essentially makes the LISTAGG function unuseable.

Can someone help me understand what is going on here? (This is probably something similar to why it is necessary to give aliases for output columns, when in typical Trino it would not be...)

Is there any kind of flawless documentation on which SQL-functions are available in the Signavio Backend?

Best,

Benedict

PS.: I can receive similar results to LISTAGG with the function ARRAY_AGG, but I am still curious why some functionality from the guide does not work.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence

entry.title: Re: Move selection screen parameters data to my table fields
entry.content: It's non sense to have "SELECT * FROM ztfi_affec_a ... WHERE ..." inside the loop because you each run has same WHERE values.

entry.title: Re: Jump from SAC to S/4 Fiori App

entry.title: Re: Move selection screen parameters data to my table fields
entry.content: Sorry, people can't debug your code and don't know the contents of ztfi_affec_a, only you can check the values of the variables and what are the contents of ztfi_affec_a.

Hi @RaghavanKathamuthu

Thank you!!

With resource category 0008?

Duration

Lot size depent dur?

Darsy

entry.title: Re: Actions - via PA30 - Values not transferred to Org. Assignment screen
entry.content: Do you have integration between PA and Org. switched on?

entry.title: Re: Create System on SAP BTP
entry.content: There are two (technical different) trial offerings for SAP BTP ABAP Environment (see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/get-started-with-sap-btp-abap-environment-trial-account-vs-free-tier-option/ba-p/13663694). You can develop RAP-based Fiori applications as a POC. But creating an Add-On requires and additional build system, which is not covered by the trial offering. The free tier trial offering is limited to only 1 system. Creating an Add-On requires a commercial license like TDD (see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/solution-partner-models-for-sap-btp-abap-environment/ba-p/13530974)

entry.title: Re: S4HC Public - Payment Status
entry.content: This issue on SAP HANA CLOUD PUBLIC was not yet solved. There is no SSCUI where you could select new custom mapping for specific bank over Message Type / BIC

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Credit Management - New Information Category 50
entry.content:
Hello all, 

we need your help. For our understanding, why are we missing the Tab Additional Information for App Manage Credit Accounts (App ID F4596). 

Kind regards

Matthias

entry.title: Re: Type for input parameter for XML string
entry.content: Do you mean you have generated a SOAP Web Service over the function module ? And that it must contain given parameters like IDOC_IN ? So define the parameter IDOC_IN as per the Web service specifications, that's it. People here don't know your specifications/requirement so provide them if you want to be helped.

entry.title: How to extend NPM Base64 credentials to build Composable Storefront
entry.content:
How to extend NPM Base64 credentials to build Composable Storefront

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to extend NPM Base64 credentials to build Composa...
entry.content:
Please be informed that there is no possibility to extended and need to be regenerated for more details you may refer to following article: 3488162 - Extending RBSC Credential Validity for Composable Storefront

Regarding npm base64 credentials you would need to regenerate them and put new value into .npmrc file as per following article: 3358218 - No longer able to download Composable Storefront due to "401 Unauthorized" - SAP Commerce Cloud

Embed like that:

entry.title: Re: Deleting bank statements after Reset transaction data
entry.content: Answer is easy  - just do Test Data Refresh

entry.title: Re: Joule for ABAP-Developers: An unexpected error occured

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required: Issues with SCI Check Process and Virus Scan Warning in SAP
entry.content: For Virus Scan, see answers here and do the customizing as explained: https://www.google.com/search?q=virus+scan+profile+is+not+active+in+sap

entry.title: Re: Create Product with Generic Material type from soap
entry.content:
Hello @Pyae_Phyo_Thwe 

 

The Communication User calling the SOAP Service Product Master - Replicate from Client to SAP S/4HANA Cloud needs to have the setup instructions as outlined in the scope item Master Data Integration (1RO) maintained otherwise it can cause the error you receive 

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-013/2502/SolP/1RO?region=DE

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Crystal Reports PDF export fails when running as Windows Service – Interactive session required?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are currently using an application called **Diptache**, which relies on **Crystal Reports** (version 2016) to generate PDF reports.

The application works **perfectly when a user is logged in interactively** (via RDP or local session). However, when we try to run it as a **Windows Service** (with a system account or service account and **no active user session**), the PDF export **fails silently** — no error, no output.

The software vendor claims that **Crystal Reports requires an active desktop session** to render and export reports to PDF. While this might be related to COM objects or PDF rendering engines, we are trying to find a **clean server-side solution** to run the application headlessly (as a true Windows Service).

We are looking for feedback from the community:

- Has anyone successfully run Crystal Reports **in a Windows Service context** without requiring an interactive session?
- Are there known workarounds (e.g. specific PDF printers, registry tweaks, CRRuntime settings)?
- Would installing a different PDF export library or modifying the rendering engine settings help?
- Is this limitation documented officially somewhere?

Any help or experience shared would be greatly appreciated 🙏

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Create Product with Generic Material type from soap
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Master Data

entry.title: Re: Assistance Required: Issues with SCI Check Process and Virus Scan Warning in SAP
entry.content: The result 0 / 0 / 0 doesn't mean that 0 objects were processed, it means that there was no error, no warning, no information for the selected object(s).

entry.title: How to make a field read only in an appraisal document when the document is already released
entry.content:
How to make a field read only in an appraisal document when the document is already released and appraisal templates are attached to it in sap hcm ecc?

Please help me. 

after entering tcode "PHAP_CATALOG" and selecting the appraisal template error is showing as 

"cannot change as it is released"

when I am trying to un release it, then it is throwing error.

entry.title: Re: Parameter reference for SFTP Advanced Mode
entry.content:
3607095 - Enable Key Transmission from Local Directory in SFTP Adapter - SAP for Me

Two new advanced mode parameters have been introduced:

useLocalPrivateKey (default: false)
When set to true, the adapter will read the private key file from a local directory specified by the openSshKeyPath parameter.

openSshKeyPath (default: null)
Specifies the file path to the OpenSSH private key. This parameter is required only when useLocalPrivateKey is set to true.

entry.title: Re: "Mastering the Application Rationalization with SAP LeanIX" access to Lean IX says inv
entry.content: login issue persists - new login ID and PWD do not work

entry.title: Re: Assign Multiple Cost Centers to a Personnel Number in...
entry.content:
Hello @Paolo_De_Rosa5 

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (2502), standard master data allows only one default Cost Center per Personnel Number. However, for project-based scenarios with multiple Cost Centers, the recommended, standard approach without custom development or F3697A is:

Use Time Recording with Account Assignment (Scope Item 1Q4)

  • Employees can record time directly to WBS Elements or internal orders, independent of their default Cost Center.
  • The system derives actual cost allocation based on the project (WBS) or order, not the master data Cost Center.

Ensure Integration with:

  • 4I9 Project Control – Sales
  • 4RF Project Resourcing and Procurement
  • 1NT Period-End Closing – Finance

This setup allows flexibility where personnel costs post to different WBS Elements or orders, which in turn can settle to different Cost Centers, fully within Public Cloud standard.

Key Point: You do not need to change master data or use Direct Activity Allocation if timesheets are recorded properly with project account assignments.

Reference:

  • SAP Help – Time Recording
  • SAP Help - Scope Item 1Q4 -Configure Test Your Processes

With regards

Chuma

entry.title: Tree Table loads data only in client operationModeand not in server operationMode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am developing a tree table with basic odata binding and tree annotations(same as given in SDK). However in my case  data is shown only when I use operationMode:'Client'.

 need to filter data based on some Phases, but with  operationMode : client, the filter is ignored.

And when I use operationMode:Server, data is fetched from the backend ,but the table appers blank.

Please find below the xml code -

 <TreeTable id="TreeTableBasic" rowActionCount="1" rows="{

            path : '/MasterscreenSet',      

            parameters : {

            countMode: 'Inline',

            operationMode:'Client',

            numberOfExpandedLevels: '{helperJson>/numberOfExpandedLevels}',

                treeAnnotationProperties : {

                    hierarchyLevelFor : 'HierarchyLevel',

                    hierarchyNodeFor : 'NodeID',

                    hierarchyParentNodeFor : 'ParentNodeID',

                    hierarchyDrillStateFor : 'DrillState'

                }

            }

        }"

        enableSelectAll="false" selectionMode="None" ariaLabelledBy="title" class="teamTableText" rowMode="Interactive" enableBusyIndicator="true"

        busyIndicatorDelay="0" dataReceived="onDataReceived">

Thanks & Regards,

Aastha

SAPUI5 OData  SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: Re: LMS items are opening in new page and redirecting to SSO URL
entry.content:
Hello there,

Wondering if you were referring to the OCN contents, where it redirects to LiL or any other content providers via the SSO.

We have seen this problem with one customer, and recall back then the SAP suggestion was to launch inline. However I failed to find the KBA that mentioned this information.

However, recently one of the other customers is facing issues when launching the OCN content inline, the SSO/Authentication wouldn't work, but if launched in a new window, it works perfectly fine. So we raised the case with SAP and SAP is currently investigating the issue.

If your situation does not fit any of the above, could you please elaborate a bit further on what was the issue specifically? Or if the case has been resolved by SAP, could you please provide a bit more insight so that in case we face the same issue in the future, we can refer back to this post?

Thank you very much in advance.

Cheers,
Sunny

entry.title: Payment Medium Format .txt creation (ASCII (comma separated))
entry.content:
Hi Team, I'm completely new to this so please understand 🙂.

S/4HANA Public Cloud / Map Format Data  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance 

I've used the templates already provided to create Payment Medium Format files which the client is currently testing for other banks via MBC.  They have an additional requirement for an Indian Bank HDFC Bank Limited, who need the output files to be in a flat file format, i.e. .txt, ASCII (comma separated).

The Bank have provided an example file and a structure - how do I convert that to a viable file in Map Format Data?  This must have been done before ?  So I'm hoping there are examples someone can share or show me so I can use this to create the file I need to create.  Struggling to find resources / content that will help me with this.

thanks for any help you can offer.

C

entry.title: Re: Unable to Create Replication Model for SAP_COM_0009
entry.content:
Hi @Kai_Suzuki28 

 

The Replications apps are available in the business catalog SAP_CA_BC_DATA_REP_PC

If the Business catalog does not appear in the Business Catalog app then the Scope item 1RO Master Data Integration 

is not active (  https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolP/1RO )

When activated , you can follow the setup instructions in the scope item to setup SAP_COM_0009

Information on the Data Replication Framework is available at the resoure Data Replication Framework

and what apps are available . I could not find an app called Manage Replication Models

How to activate a scope item is outlined in the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3122430

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Sharing large itabs across external sessions
entry.content:
You could

  • Create a Z table similar to DEMO_INDX_TABLE (with a date ot timestamp field)
  • Use some EXPORT TO/IMPORT FROM./DELETE FROM the Z table in your code
  • Schedule a periodic report to remove old records with a DELETE FROM of old records (with the date/timstamp field)

entry.title: Re: Unable to cancel Shipment Cost Document
entry.content: Hi

entry.title: Re: Unable to cancel Shipment Cost Document
entry.content: Hi Could you please guide how to delete freight invoice MIRO

entry.title: Re: Bank Country`s are missing in App F6437 Manage Banks...
entry.content: Baically only countries with an already created bank are selected.

entry.title: Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType' in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team, 

I have created a Iflow, in which i have to patch all the entities with dynamic values for Business Partner. The flow is "Salesforce to CPI to SAP S/4Hana Public Cloud"

When i got the Salesforce payload, i tried to patch the first entity called "Business Partner"  got 204 response and when i tried to patch for Second entity "A_BusinessPartnerAddress" getting error(With same iflow).

I have gone through Batch process also,  followed by multiple blog 
blog1: https://medium.com/@vothedung91/sap-cpi-batch-processing-with-multiple-entities-220395b075a5

blog2: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/batch-request-with-patch-operation-on-multiple-functionally-related-entity/ba-p/13562530

Error: 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<error xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/ado/2007/08/dataservices/metadata">
<code>/IWBEP/CM_MGW_RT/020</code>
<message xml:lang="en">Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType'</message>
<innererror>
<application>
<component_id>LO-MD-BP</component_id>
<service_namespace>/SAP/</service_namespace>
<service_id>API_BUSINESS_PARTNER</service_id>
<service_version>0001</service_version>
</application>
<transactionid>69c60bac5af14a7399ad962d3b346d0c</transactionid>
<timestamp>20250626090941.9387880</timestamp>
<Error_Resolution>
<SAP_Transaction>For backend administrators: use ADT feed reader "SAP Gateway Error Log" or run transaction /IWFND/ERROR_LOG on SAP Gateway hub system and search for entries with the timestamp above for more details</SAP_Transaction>
<SAP_Note>See SAP Note 1797736 for error analysis (https://service.sap.com/sap/support/notes/1797736)</SAP_Note>
</Error_Resolution>
<longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_BusinessPartnerAddressType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
<errordetails>
<errordetail>
<ContentID/>
<code>/IWBEP/CX_MGW_BUSI_EXCEPTION</code>
<message>Resource not found for segment 'A_BusinessPartnerAddressType'</message>
<longtext_url>/sap/opu/odata/iwbep/message_text;o=LOCAL/T100_longtexts(MSGID='%2FIWBEP%2FCM_MGW_RT',MSGNO='020',MESSAGE_V1='A_BusinessPartnerAddressType',MESSAGE_V2='',MESSAGE_V3='',MESSAGE_V4='')/$value</longtext_url>
<propertyref/>
<severity>error</severity>
<target/>
<transition>false</transition>
</errordetail>
</errordetails>
</innererror>
</error>

iflow information : Used  "Content Modifer- to set-up the structure, based on XSD" --> "request-reply- ODatav2 Adapter(receiver) patch operation & selected all the field in "A_BusinessPartnerAddress entity" deployed it and triggered through Postman tool , got the error as response. 

Note: When i tried with default values its updating  successfully, when i tried to set values based on Properties then getting error.

Team, suggest any resolution to fix this.

Thanks,
Mansoor Basha

entry.title: Re: Error on syncing html5 application to content channel
entry.content:
you have your own app router?

I think workzone work with managed app router.

entry.title: Error when trying to delete fs item
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to delete an fs item and am getting an error message, that the item is in used. The message says "FS item is used in global consolidation of investment settings".

The only attribute defined for the fs item is the currency translation selection, all other selection and target attributes are empty. The fs item is not defined as any target (elimination, NCI, plan, offsetting) for any other fs item.

In the consolidation of investment section in SPRO the fs item is not mentioned anywhere. It is also not used for any purpose in any reclassification.

Where else should I search to find the cause for the message?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports PDF export fails when running as Wind...
entry.content:
This is not a Crystal limitation.

Ken Hamady maintains a listing of 3rd-party Crystal Reports automation tools here.
Several of these tools support exporting/emailing with no user session.

entry.title: Difference in VA05 output and BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST to get Open Orders Value
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

when i ran VA05 report to get open orders for customer A , numbers of orders came 39 while running the FM BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST for same customer , it fetched 22 orders , i am not able to find the reasoning on it . my objectve is to find the open orders value basis on customer to prepare a FS for a Z report

Please help on this to build the logic

entry.title: Re: Alternative CoA - G/L account type
entry.content:
Dear Jas,
The details on How to Create an Alternative Chart of Accounts is given in help portal document

Posting to Alternative Accounts:
When you manually create journal entries in different apps in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you enter a G/L account number for each line item. This is usually the G/L account number for your operating COA. However, if you have company codes that use an alternative COA, you can opt to use the alternative G/L account for the posting instead.

To set this up, you first activate the use of alternative accounts in the Edit Options for Journal Entries app. After activation, when you manually create a journal entry, for example, in the Manage Journal Entries app, you enter a company code that has been assigned to the alternative COA. The app then allows you to enter the alternative account from the alternative COA. The alternative account number is displayed in the G/L Account field. The corresponding account in your operating COA is shown in the G/L Account (Company Code CoA) field.

Refer the help portal document:- Chart of Accounts: Different Types

Regards,

Bhawesh

entry.title: Re: New Projects | Early Insights | Real Influence - SAP Customer Engagement Initiative Cycle 2-2025

Thanks.

NB

entry.title: Re: How to map a "picklist" field from Employee Central - Position Management to Job Requi
entry.content: If you don't have unique external code, use as below,

entry.title: Re: Using Flexible Hierarchies Instead of Standard Hierarchies for Cost and Profit Centers in S/4HAN
entry.content:
Global Hierarchies only work in Master Data fields. We can't use fields from ACDOCA.

You can include the field e.g. in the Cost Center Master data as described in section "Using a custom field in flexible hierarchies".

Or you can try to build a Custom Hierarchy on the field as described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/e8669206c4804afb8337fba8ef85f2c0.html?locale=en-US&q=Global+Hierarchies+custom

entry.title: Re: Unknown objects in COEP, COSP, COSS
entry.content:
Browse table TBO00 'Object type control parameters' with text table TBO01.

  • EO stand for 'Profitability segment' (so CO-PA)

Related Archive Objects (generated) start with 'COPA' followed by a letter for the base and an underscore and end with the Operating Concern Code

entry.title: Re: Issue with deployment of SAP UI5 application from BAS...
entry.content: can you put a Z in front of the name?

entry.title: Re: Getting 404 Not Found retrieving Image from on prem backend after deploying to Subaccount

entry.title: Re: How to get the email of the logged in user in Cloud Foundry

The more I have to work in PaaS and microservices, the more I realize what we have lost...

entry.content: Perfect answer, thank you !

entry.title: Re: Rewards & Recognition: Guidelines formula
entry.content: Hi Ana Lousada, where have you added the last rule i.e rule number 3

entry.title: FILTER Operation with NE (Not Equal to) in WHERE Clause not working.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

As evident from the subject am trying to make use of FILTER Syntax for finding the Non-matching records between Two Internal tables.

Below is the code snippet,

DATA(lt_delta_spec_chars)
= FILTER #( lt_spec_chars IN lt_material_config
WHERE charact NE charact ).

Below are the snapshots of Data:

CHARACT with value 'CP_SIL_BAND' is the matching and you can see that there is no NON-Matching record,

Still for below code:

The result is:

Requesting to enlighten where I am wrong here.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Be Part of the Action - Join SAP Inside Track Hyderabad This July
entry.content:
To All Members of the SAP Ecosystem,

We’re excited to share some fantastic news, SAP Inside Track Hyderabad is making a grand return on July 26, 2025! Whether you're a seasoned SAP professional or just beginning your journey, this is your chance to connect, collaborate, and grow with fellow enthusiasts and experts.

Join us for an inspiring day filled with knowledge-sharing sessions, hands-on insights, and valuable networking opportunities. We can’t wait to welcome you to a day dedicated to innovation and community spirit.

Event Snapshot:

Registrations Are Now Open!

Reserve your spot today and be part of this vibrant community event: [Click here to register]

Note: This is a fully in-person event, we’re excited to meet and engage with you face-to-face.

Got questions or interested in sharing your expertise through a session? Reach out to us anytime at sapcommunityhyderabad@gmail.com. We’d love to hear from you!

Let’s come together to learn, share, and celebrate the spirit of the SAP community. See you at SIT Hyderabad 2025!

For more information, please refer to the blog shared by @Ruthvik_Chowdary1  and Blog by @poonam_goje0382

entry.title: Re: Project System work in progress accrued income
entry.content:
Hi Mr. Ken,

Thank you for your Valuable feedback.

As per your Suggestion we have tried With Result analysis Method 14 -Derive Cost of Sales from Resource-Related Billing of Dynamic Items and 15 - Derive Revenue from Resource-Related Billing and Simulation of Dynamic Items, But system is showing error as ( No sale order or Contracts Have been created for the Respective WBS) But if we use 01- Revenue-Based Method - With Profit Realization, System is calculating WIP and it is allowing to run settlement . But what we expect is not met till now, For few test Settlement system is showing Budget error. But in the respective WBS Sufficient Budget is there

Second thing is, whatever all expenses incurred is falling on actual costs. But system is picking the same for the Planned costs also. It is not correct Right ? Whatever budget derived in the WBS element have to be shown in the Planned Cost Right ? 

Major thing Advice us how to Analyze missing Configuration for PS-SD-FI? Then how to make setups and transactions ? And how to settle our Project (WBS) in CJ88 ?

Thanks & Regards 

Thoufick,

Here in second line how can i add my billing document template. Please help.

Thanks

Sarat.

If you have any idea

Thanks in advance, 

Cédric

I asked whether there is a difference between the G/L account type of the Alternative G/L account and the account type of the operating G/L account... and why the default type of the accounts in alternative CoA is se to "Nonoperating Expense or Income" while in Operating CoA it is set to "Primary Costs or Revenue". Does the set up of the gl account type on the level of alternative gl accounts matter? thank you.

entry.title: Re: LMS Story Reports Error
entry.content: same we are also facing the same issue,unble to understand

entry.title: Re: Sudden wrong results in app behaviour for previous well working formulas in settings and compone
entry.content:
Hi, we are working on this issue. Meanwhile you could add a short delay to global canvas prior you are setting the variable value. we suspect that there is some timing change and system variables are not always getting properly initialised prior those are accessed. This same should apply to the other failing scenario where you sent a reference app.

Let us know if this helps you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio: How to Convert yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss (Str...
entry.content:
Hi, 

as I was preparing another SAP Community post on the list of available SQL-functions in Signavio Process Intelligence backend, I noticed that the TO_TIMESTAMP function is simply not available in the backend. A somewhat complete list of available functions is in the Trino documentation List of functions and operators — Trino 476 Documentation.

So to solve your issue you should probably use the DATE_PARSE function, which conveniently allows you to not use REPLACE. I have quickly tried it in my own evironment with this code:

SELECT
    date
    ,DATE_PARSE(date, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS timestamp
FROM
    (VALUES
        (1, '2025-06-26T14:51:00')
        ,(2, '2025-06-25T15:51:00')
        ,(3, '2025-06-24T16:51:00')
    ) t(id, date)

Let me know if it works for you!

Best,

Benedict

entry.title: Re: EPC-992 - WBS on consignment stock - Public cloud
entry.content: Hello Raymond, thank you for the response. We will look into submitting a feature request.

entry.title: Re: Guidance Required on Enabling DTO for ADSOs with Non-...
entry.content:
Hi

fist of all you have to define and install with your basis team the targets of DSO - DTO for storing the cold /warm data . After,  to define data temperatures for DSOs,  you should create partitions in the settings of the relevant DSOs based on fields of type DATS.  Typically partitions infobject(eg 0CALMONTH, 0CALYEaR)  are KEY fields in DSOs -

When your partitions for dso and intervals are defined  you can manage the intervals of temperature easily with transactions RSOADSODTO in the gui. 

please check the distinction beetween statical and dynamical partitions for BW4 in sap help.

hope it helps

entry.title: Re: FILTER Operation with NE (Not Equal to) in WHERE Clau...
entry.content:
You have the filter reversed (should be the larger list getting filtered) -

DATA(lt_delta_spec_chars)
= FILTER #( lt_material_config IN lt_spec_chars
WHERE charact NE charact ).

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: How to add signature document generated through 'open text' in successfactors onboarding
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

For one of our client they currently use 'Open Text' to generate the document and they want those documents to be presented to onboardee. How to achieve this? as the documents are generated specific to individual Onboardee?

entry.title: Re: Industry fields in the Customer/Supplier master data not populated in supplier line items
entry.content: Hello Chuma,

entry.title: Re: How to Use Dynamic Pictures on Document Generation
entry.content:
Hello Ugur,

thanks for sharing your knowledge, a similar approach could be be used for dynamic text?

I meant for this user case:

a Document Template for employees should include additional text when the letter is generated by an employee who are on a paid or unpaid leave of absence. The additional text should not be visible if the template is generated by an employee who is not on a leave of absence.

I appreciate your comments and expertise.

entry.title: Re: Import BPMN Models in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi Leh Hoon,

thanks for your question.

You can use the Custom Process API to import BPMN 2.0 diagrams from any tool as long as it is following standards of BPMN 2.0. If there is no direct integration in place by the other tool an workaround is to export from the third party tool and import via API or from UI into SAP Cloud ALM. From Cloud ALM side we offer our open APIs so other tools can use them and build the integrations.

 

 

What we have already in place is a standard integration with SAP Signavio.

 

Best regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: Industry fields in the Customer/Supplier master data...
entry.content: Hello Chuma, I do not think the custom fields and logic are needed. We can see the industry fields which are created by SAP. We only cannot see the once we created. Thank you Luci

entry.content:
Dear community,

I am a huge fan of the BIPST.  The last release is from Nov 17, 2023 with 2.1 Patch 15.

Is the development still ongoing?

Regards
Roberto

SAP BusinessObjects BI support tool 

SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence platform

entry.title: Re: Validation of Assembly Data during Component Scanning...
entry.content:
Hi Manoel,

Just want to ask is there any updates on the coreplugin extensions. Wewere able to use the core plugin extension few months back. Now when we reploy the same core plugins, we fail to see the purple icon and also no tabs in developer mode. The extension is deployed on cloud foundary and can be seen similar to the image posted by you in the blog. Also the UI extension remains the same. 
Could you please let me know where could be the issue or is there any changes missing. 
Thank you in advance. 

KR,
Sayuj

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content:
Hi, 

Could you please organize a codejam about Custom Analytical Queries app combined with the Custom CDS view app? 
There has been a TechEd session about the Custom Analytical Queries app in the past: https://github.com/SAP-samples/teched2023-DT169 . I think it would be nice to combine this with the Custom CDS views app. There is already a tutorial on that app: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-extensibility-custom-cds.html. 
Combining those two would imho make an awesome codejam.

entry.title: Re: Custom recording dictionary adding extra blank space
entry.content: Did you build your Recording Dictionary from scratch, or did you Duplicate it from a generic SEN Recording Dictionary and then modify it? I have never seen your issue before, and I've been using this tool since 2009, but I always Duplicate a generic dictionary and then modify it. For example, my input_text.prac says "Input a value in the [B_NAME] box.<br/><br/>For this example, type [B_INPUT]." In HTML, that becomes <p>Input a value in the <span style="font-weight: bold;">$#{fieldname}</span> box. <br><br>For this example, type <span style>="font-weight: bold;">$#{text_d}</span>.</p>. There is no space in the $#{text_d}</span>.</p> (a space before the period) and it works fine. We are Cloud SEN. I've never seen this happen in On-Prem either. I'm not an HTML expert but perhaps it's something in how your browser is interpreting the HTML, because I don't think it's being caused by SEN. We use the latest versions of Edge and Chrome. I have seen some authors be annoyed by the $I{fieldicon} placeholder when they turn off the Object Image property, because the placeholder remains in the HTML and occupies one space, meaning you will have a space where you don't necessarily want one. To those authors, I always say "Let the tool do what it does. Most end users will not notice the extra space, and it's not worth your author time to delete the placeholder HTML just to get rid of a space."

entry.title: Re: Validation of Assembly Data during Component Scanning...
entry.content: Hi @Sayuj, I´m not aware of any issues and suggest you raise a ticket for proper support. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Can LMS Notifications be targeted by Custom Fields?
entry.content: In SAP SuccessFactors Learning we want internal and external users to receive different notifications.  There is a custom field on the user record that identify them as internal or external.  Can we update email notifications so that those 2 types of users receive different notifications?

entry.title: Re: FILTER Operation with NE (Not Equal to) in WHERE Clau...
entry.content:
First thanks for your prompt response.

But there can be a situation vice versa as well meaning lt_spec_chars having more records than lt_material_config, but the ultimate thing needed here is filter out the CHARACT entry of lt_spec_chars which is not there in lt_material_config.

So writing 2 FILTER queries based on the LINE counts of both the Internal Tables is the only solution here?

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Bonjour ,

J'ai configuré ADS ( Adobe Documents Service ) sur SAP Netweaver et on arrivant à l'étape de la création de la destionation http PC_ICF_DATA_ <SID> j'ai eu l'erreur suivate lors du test ping : 

Error during ping operation: Ping not successful! Received HTTP response 401

Merci d'avance

 

Cordialement

entry.title: Re: How to create delta keyfigure in a SAC story table
entry.content:
Hi 

you can create a calculated measure with INPUT CONTROL option on your different periods

 

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion - Learning Center categories
entry.content: You can always add Custom Properties, but those new property fields go in their own section of the Properties pane. There's no provision that I know of for editing generic SEN properties or their drop-down values. And even if you managed to edit it, I doubt it would be supported by SAP, and might get overwritten in an upgrade. I myself have never used the Learning Center Categories. I defer to Shane/Anton/smart people on this question, though.

entry.title: Re: How to delete a reosurce in ppds
entry.content: In you case the model assignment button is active. But in my case its not active. Since asked the query.

entry.title: Re: Special characters for projects - checkboxes not appe...
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

While trying to troubleshoot the issue , i came across a similar topic and it's several potential solutions :

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/opsk-field-not-editable-in-change-mode/qaq-p/619195

for my case,  it worked by executing a program that insert a line in the TCJ01 table , example shown bellow  ( as explained in the SAP community link attached also) : 

e.g :

- - - - - - - - - - -

REPORT Z_PSFIXTCJ01.

DATA: itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF TCJ01,
wa LIKE LINE OF itab.

wa-mandt = '120'. "where 120 is the client you are configuring.
wa-argum = 'X'.
wa-STRKZ = '1'.
insert tcj01 from wa.

- - - - - - - - - - -

entry.title: Re: Getting error in SAP Integration Suite IFLOW - Unreso...
entry.content:
Let’s break down the issue to find out the root cause.

  • Disconnect any VPN connection.
  • In the Postman call the Token url endpoint directly not from authorization tab. Check the connection and validate CURL.
  • Replicate the same in SAP CPI by calling the token URL with above postman CURL values.

Note this test is only calling token URL to fetch token value. Once this is working we can check next.

entry.content:
@TOlschewski54 :

thanks for asking!

Hope this helps, Claudia

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello,

I configured ADS (Adobe Document Service) on SAP Netweaver and when I reached the step of creating the http destination PC_ICF_DATA_<SID>, I received the following error during the ping TEST:

Error during ping operation: Ping failed! HTTP 401 response received.

 

 

 

Thank You

Regards,

entry.title: Re: Print HU label at Product WT confirmation in S/4HANA...
entry.content:
Hi @Christian_Ries , @Ryan-Crosby @Markas 

How would you avoid that the label is printed when you confirm the WT on the HU and a second time when you confirm the HU on the destination location? Because in our system we confirm via RF and therefore they are split up in 2 tasks. 
We only want to print the label when the HU is confirmed on the destination location. 

Scenario: 
1 WO, 3WT's. 3items. 
item A: 3PC, item B: 2PC, item C: 1PC
Picker picks:
1) item A 2PC on the first HU, press next and confirm on staging bin (2 times triggered)
2) Item A 1PC item B 2PC on the scond HU, press next and confirm on staging bin (3 times triggerd)
3) item C 1PC on the third HU, confirm on staging bin


Kr Jeroen

entry.title: Onboarding 2.0 - Recruit to hire data mapping validation issues
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Kind suggestions required to troubleshoot the Job Info data mapping validation error - It has been hard to figure out which field is giving the error - The recruit to hire data mapping UI does not give an explicit reference on the field producing the error. 

The development tool kit on Chrome also has not produced a response that is explicit to interprete, highly technical to interpret.

This is impacting on the onboarding triggers for:

  • regular internal hires (employees)
  • concurrent employments triggering onboarding
  • contingent employments

Thanks in advance,

Rac

entry.title: Re: Datasphere & SAC Users and Activities Source Tables
entry.content: how did you manage then...let me know any other alternative please

entry.title: Re: FILTER Operation with NE (Not Equal to) in WHERE Clau...
entry.content:
With this code am aiming to find any record which is not in common between the above 2 Internal Tables based on a comparison using the common CHARACT field and FILTER operation. And the thing is any of the Tables here can have record counts on a greater side in comparison to the other Table. So, in such situations FILTER won't work is my question? Since you can see that in my example case that entry is there common with both the Tables and it should not have been deduced as a result of that FILTER query.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Re: Datasphere & SAC Users and Activities Source Tables
entry.content: Tried to automate the download, processing and upload as much as possible with scripting
